system.description:
Conjurers are the runners who learned how to open the door and call something through it. They came up in occult academies, basement summoning rings, and the half-licensed binding schools that the corps quietly fund and quietly deny. They keep a working library of names, geometries, and apologies, and they revise it constantly.

On the job, the Conjurer is the operator who shows up alone and somehow is not. The blade that hovers, the form that crouches in the rafters, the second-self that walks the next floor over: these are not pets. They are agreements, fragile and renegotiated every time. The Conjurer is the only one who knows the price of breaking them.
system.grants: Summoning rituals, bound entity companion, portal and teleport effects.

wizard.tagline: Summoner who pulls allies and weapons from beyond the Veil
